case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. GUSTAVO LAGUNA CARDIEL et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIEL, GUSTAVO LAGUNA , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA VIVIANNA TRUCKING DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-09-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-25-2007

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DILIGENCE DECLARATION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED JUL-27-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIEL, GUSTAVO LAGUNA , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA VIVIANNA TRUCKING

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $353.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIEL, GUSTAVO LAGUNA , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA VIVIANNA TRUCKING
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF ERNEST KNOWLES RE DEFAULT HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDIEL, GUSTAVO LAGUNA , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA VIVIANNA TRUCKING POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1999 PETERBILT 379 VIN 1XP5DR9X6XD501152, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $21,980.75 DAMAGES, $2,525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $353.00 COSTS, $313.04 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,171.79, PROPERTY FAIR MARKET VALUE $9,000.00 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
